hero.title: Marketing, development, design, SEO, ecommerce, and branding.
hero.lead: Marketing BuzzWorthy’s public site emphasizes six core service areas. This page turns those into a usable service architecture.

services.title: Marketing
services.copy: We use strategic marketing tactics that have been proven to work.

services.title: Development
services.copy: Custom programming for most complex functions you can think. No more headaches. Focus on the business logic.

services.title: Web Design
services.copy: Powerful web design that will out-perform your strongest competitors.

services.title: SEO Optimisation
services.copy: Optimizing our web designs to rank on the first page of Google is our specialty.

services.title: Ecommerce
services.copy: We build your online store using a flexible, modular platform that allows you to expand and grow.

services.title: Branding
services.copy: A solid brand strategy, logo and guidelines help you get recognized.

process.title: Design
process.copy: Establish color scheme, layout, sitemap, and style.

process.title: Develop
process.copy: Turn ideas into working pages and systems.

process.title: Support
process.copy: Keep design, marketing, and maintenance aligned after launch.
